NF.Title: Name Forge
NF.Blurb: Generate names for any genre or culture, fully offline.
NF.CopyHint: Click a name to copy it
NF.CreateHint: Create an actor with this name
NF.ActorCreateFailed: Could not create the actor. See console for details.
NF.Settings.OnlyGenerateNames.Name: Only Generate Names
NF.Settings.OnlyGenerateNames.Hint: Hide the "Create as" actor-type picker and the per-result actor-creation button, leaving name generation/copying only. Turn off to bring back actor creation.
NF.Settings.ShowDirectoryButton.Name: Show Button in Actors Directory
NF.Settings.ShowDirectoryButton.Hint: Show the Name Forge button at the bottom of the Actors sidebar tab.
